priorTitles: Pedestrian safety hazard due to lack of lighting
Dark stretch on Outer Ring Road service lane
narrative: This is a recurring pattern of infrastructure maintenance failure. Reports spanning February to April 2025 indicate persistent outages outside of seasonal weather events, suggesting a systematic malfunction rather than isolated incidents. The repeat complaints highlight a failure to rectify the lighting issue permanently, posing a continued safety risk to pedestrians navigating the ORR service road in total darkness.
